filesystem.description: Read/write files and list directories in the workspace

fetch.description: Fetch web pages and HTTP resources

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph and memory store

puppeteer.description: Browser automation — screenshots, scraping, UI testing

sqlite.description: Query and manage a local SQLite database

brave_search.description: Web and news search via Brave Search API (requires BRAVE_API_KEY)

github.description: GitHub repos, issues, PRs, and code search (requires GITHUB_TOKEN)

tavily.description: AI-optimised web search via Tavily (requires TAVILY_API_KEY)

exa.description: Neural search and content retrieval via Exa (requires EXA_API_KEY)

google_maps.description: Geocoding, directions, and places via Google Maps (requires GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY)
